description: Boot power-on sequence for M1 Pro/Max 16" EVTc. Key difference from A2442: 42A PP3V8_AON design, 5 Monaco instances, 3 Viper power stages, USB-C 5V regulators (UF800/UG800) instead of load switches.

sequence.name: USB-C Cable Insertion -- 5V Default
sequence.action: USB-C cable inserted. Charger provides default 5V. CD3217/CD3218 internal MOSFET passes 5V.

sequence.name: Charger Input Active -- PPDCIN_AON
sequence.action: Charger input path enabled. Multi-FET gate drive active (CHGR_GATE G1-G6). CHGR_AUX_OK asserted via level translation (page 53). RATIO=PPDCIN/6.76 on battery debug connector.

sequence.name: PPBUS_AON Established
sequence.action: Main power bus comes up from battery (12.6V) or adapter input. Charger IC (U5200 area) with dual LS230/LS231 inductors. SYS_DETECT signal triggers P3V8AON_PWR_EN via U5150 RCLAMP and Q5155.

sequence.name: PP3V8_AON Powers Up -- U5700 SVR AON (42A)
sequence.action: U5700 converts PPBUS_AON -> PP3V8_AON (3.8V, 42A max). Multi-phase output with 3-phase summing amp ISENSE/ILIMIT. Feeds both PMUs + WiFi + display + codec + SE + speaker amps.

sequence.name: SPMU & MPMU Startup -- AON and S2 Rails Cascade
sequence.action: Both PMUs receive PP3V8_AON and generate output rails in hardware-defined sequence. AON rails first, then S2, then S1.

sequence.name: Standalone VRs Power Up -- 5V Rails
sequence.action: TPS62130 generates PP5V_S2. UF800 (LT8640) generates PP5V_USBC01 for left USB-C ports. UG800 (TPS62180) generates PP5V_USBC23 for right USB-C/HDMI.

sequence.name: Viper VR Powers Up -- PCPU Domains (3 stages)
sequence.action: U9300 Viper VR controller starts 3 multi-phase power stages (vs 2 on A2442). PCPU clusters receive DVFS voltage. 5 phase input cap banks (PH1-PH5) on support page.

sequence.name: Monaco VR Powers Up -- GPU/Fabric Domains (5 instances)
sequence.action: 5 Monaco VR instances start (vs 3 on A2442). Each has HP and LP buck phases. Generate GPU, fabric, and SoC compute domains. Monaco 3 and 4 are additions for Max variant support. CLVR fabric throttle via UC000 (74AP1G06) on page 120.

sequence.name: M1 Pro/Max Hard Start Complete -- SoC Commands CD3217
sequence.action: SoC U6600 completed OTP and hard start. Commands CD3217/CD3218 to negotiate PD.

sequence.name: PD Negotiation -> 20V Boost
sequence.action: CD3217/CD3218 negotiates 20V from charger. PPVBUS transitions 5V -> 20V. Protection isolation passes. PPBUS_AON stabilises.

sequence.name: Soft Start -- SSD, BIOS, Display
sequence.action: SoC reads dual SSDs (SSD0 + SSD1 via Ocarina LN400/LN900), loads firmware, display power sequencer (UP710, page 113) enables Mini-LED Liquid Retina XDR panel, Luxe backlight driver UP800 (KAAC01908) activates. Apple LOGO appears.
subsystems: Display power sequencer UP710 (page 113): LCD_PWR_EN -> EDP_PANEL_PWR_EN -> EDP_BKLT_1V29_EN
HDMI Madea UK700 (page 91) -- if external display connected
SD card UK500 GL9755 (page 94) -- if card inserted
